name: Passkeys for Neto Login on Windows
body:
[{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Introducing Passkeys"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto by Maropost supports passkey as one of the sign-in options. You can use a passkey instead of your login credentials to sign in."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using a passkey is a secure login option that does not require you to enter login credentials or authentication One-Time Passwords (OTPs). As a passkey, you can use quick sign-in options, such as device PIN, Face ID, fingerprint, and others."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "What is a passkey and its advantages?", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A passkey is an encrypted credential used for authenticating account login requests without the need for a username, password, or OTP, thus providing users with the convenience, all while ensuring a high degree of security. Here, users typically approve the sign-in process in the same way they unlock their devices, using biometrics, facial/fingerprint recognition, PIN, or pattern."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Since passkeys are encrypted, they are resistant to phishing and remote cyberattacks. Plus, with passkeys, there are no passwords to steal, and no sign-in data can be used to initiate an attack, thus making it a convenient login option."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Key benefits of passkeys are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Higher sign-in success rates"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Faster sign-ins"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A safer and more trustworthy alternative to a traditional sign-in method"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supports a cross-device authentication ecosystem"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Prevents malicious activity across numerous passkey-supported accounts"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set Up a Passkey (on Windows)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can set up multiple passkeys to be used for multiple accounts or devices."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Steps to register a Passkey:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Identity portal. You can access it directly at "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "https://id.maropost.com"}]}, {"text": " or from your Neto control panel, click your username at the top-right corner, and select "}, {"text": "Manage account and password", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Identity portal, select the "}, {"text": "Security", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Passwordless", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SMNNOSLW22X9/identity-passkey.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SMNNOSLW22X9/identity-passkey.jpg", "name": "Identity-Passkey.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 902691, "width": 2560, "height": 2688, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 354, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:35:21+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Set Up Passkey", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the PassKey Registration page, click "}, {"text": "Register", "bold": true}, {"text": ".
"}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You may be asked to re-authenticate (by entering your password and OTP pin) before being redirected to the passkey registration page."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3FWQQUR9TA6Y/passkeyreg.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3FWQQUR9TA6Y/passkeyreg.png", "name": "PasskeyReg.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 124261, "width": 888, "height": 942, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 355, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:35:54+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the passkey creation dialog box, select the method for creating the passkey. If you’ve configured your "}, {"text": "Windows Hello", "bold": true}, {"text": " setup with the latest updates and have installed it on your Windows device beforehand, the system displays it as a default passkey registration option."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8U7LAETHBF2A/windowshello1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8U7LAETHBF2A/windowshello1.png", "name": "WindowsHello1.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 126452, "width": 566, "height": 504, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 356, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:43:47+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If Windows Hello isn't available or configured on your device, options such as Mobile Bluetooth and USB Security Key will be the primary choices."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/G16OWU46PDDC/passkeymethodwindows.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/G16OWU46PDDC/passkeymethodwindows.png", "name": "PasskeyMethodWindows.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 102155, "width": 550, "height": 498, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 357, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:44:21+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Next, add a label for the new passkey to help identify the passkey. Finally, click "}, {"text": "Submit", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8MOHDGZPB37Q/passkeylabel.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/8MOHDGZPB37Q/passkeylabel.png", "name": "passkeylabel.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 161831, "width": 964, "height": 1080, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 358, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:44:47+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The passkey is generated and saved in your account’s Identity application."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Notes: Passkey setup variations on other web browsers:
", "bold": true}, {"text": "- If you've already signed in to Chrome with your Google account, you can save the passkey in the "}, {"text": "Google Password Manager", "bold": true}, {"text": " on your Chrome browser.
- In "}, {"text": "Firefox", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Safari", "bold": true}, {"text": " browsers, there are only three options for saving passkeys. They are, namely, Mobile Bluetooth and USB Security Key."}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Notes: Configuring passkeys using the 1Password application:
", "bold": true}, {"text": "If you are unable to create and save passkeys by following steps "}, {"text": "5", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "6", "bold": true}, {"text": ", there is another alternative in the form of "}, {"text": "1Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " encryption security:
- First, install the 1Password application on your Windows device, then add its extension to your Chrome and Microsoft Edge browsers.
- Create an account in 1Password and register the passkey.
- Now, use this passkey to access your Maropost account. Recognize that the 1Password application does not work in Incognito mode in either Chrome or Microsoft Edge."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Delete a Passkey"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you no longer require a passkey, you can delete it by following the steps below:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Identity portal, go to the "}, {"text": "Security", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab, scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Passwordless", "bold": true}, {"text": " section. Here, you can see all your passkeys."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "For the passkey that you want to delete, click "}, {"text": "Delete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E2TIBZQL771A/deletepasskey.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E2TIBZQL771A/deletepasskey.png", "name": "Deletepasskey.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 69423, "width": 1568, "height": 404, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 359, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:53:42+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Delete Passkey dialog box, click "}, {"text": "Confirm Delete", "bold": true}, {"text": ".
"}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You may be asked to re-authenticate before being redirected to the passkey deletion page."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L94L3MEXZ6DU/passkeydelete2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/L94L3MEXZ6DU/passkeydelete2.png", "name": "passkeydelete2.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 136951, "width": 880, "height": 1010, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 360, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:54:33+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Delete the passkey from the device as well; otherwise, the deletion process remains incomplete."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Logging In with Passkey (on Windows)"}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You must set up the passkey before you can use it. A user can create and manage multiple passkeys on their Identity portal."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " Steps to log in with PassKey:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Login page, click the "}, {"text": "Use Passkey", "bold": true}, {"text": " link."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/PS15QJRZQN5R/login-page-passkey.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/PS15QJRZQN5R/login-page-passkey.jpg", "name": "Login Page Passkey.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 470523, "width": 1484, "height": 1449, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 361, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:55:46+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the PassKey Login page, click the "}, {"text": "Sign In With Passkey", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2LSW103SCJJX/passkey-sign-in.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2LSW103SCJJX/passkey-sign-in.jpg", "name": "Passkey Sign In.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 513019, "width": 1532, "height": 1148, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 362, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:56:21+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You’ll be prompted for the passkey option that you have configured. If you’re using a Windows device with "}, {"text": "Windows Hello", "bold": true}, {"text": " set up, the system displays it as the default passkey login option. Here, you must enter a six-digit PIN in the Windows Hello dialog box to access your account."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/R5D0PRJQCO3V/windowshello2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/R5D0PRJQCO3V/windowshello2.png", "name": "WindowsHello2.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 637794, "width": 1920, "height": 936, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 363, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T16:56:50+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In other scenarios, you’ll be prompted to enter the passkey saved on the current device."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/THV6PNBQ7A6A/passkeymethod.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/THV6PNBQ7A6A/passkeymethod.png", "name": "passkeymethod.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 194233, "width": 952, "height": 944, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 364, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T17:00:43+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also opt for an external security key device that contains the passkey for logging in."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLTCB6XWTAWW/windowshello3.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLTCB6XWTAWW/windowshello3.png", "name": "WindowsHello3.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 103384, "width": 549, "height": 501, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 365, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T17:01:04+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upon successful verification, you’ll be redirected to your Neto control panel dashboard."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}]
